basicInfo.name: Nightmare Jin
basicInfo.flavor: Jin's iron fists are the result of extremely rigorous training. He is capable of smashing just about anything with a single punch.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 3 Allies
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Explosive Fist
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 120% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - Deals Fixed damage equal to 775 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.
 - Increases Damage: To 77.5 Fixed damage.

Skill 2.name: Extreme Fist
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 145% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 145% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Extreme Training
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Silence Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Silence Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 300% of the caster's Defense when HP falls to 25% or lower. [Duration: 15 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
Jin spent his young adult years traveling trying to prove his strength by fighting anyone he could, but when he met the monk, Li, Jin was soundly defeated.
Shocked, he returned to his hometown and pushed his body to its limits, forging a physique of steel.
With his confidence restored, Jin set out to challenge Li again. However, his terrible sense of direction led him astray in a dense forest.
After days of hunger and aimless wandering, he collapsed, unaware that he had been circling near the forest's exit.
When he awoke, he was inside a grand mansion adorned with talismans and mystical items on the doors and walls.
On Moonlit Isle, Taoist sorcery and yin-yang arts were widely revered, and the mansion belonged to Lina, a prominent Yin-Yang Master.
Instantly smitten with Lina, Jin stayed by her side even after recovering, claiming he had to repay his debt to her. He became Lina's self-appointed guard, lodger, and all-around handyman.
Lina's lack of objections to his presence has gotten Jin's hopes up.
